frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
generated_comment: Bhai sahi hai 😂 agar yeh policy aai toh phir toh har mahine 3-4 din free holiday ho gayi unke liye... hum log kab maangein 'bad mood leave'? 🙄
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment trivializes menstrual leave as a 'free holiday' and frames it as unfair privilege rather than a health accommodation, encoding workplace menstrual leave bias through dismissive humor and false equivalence.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
